# scalegrid_cloud_profile (Resource)

Manages an AWS (EC2/VPC) ScaleGrid cloud profile for Bring Your Own Cloud deployments. Azure cloud profiles require an interactive permission-granting script and are not supported by this resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An AWS (EC2/VPC) cloud profile for MongoDB deployments.
resource "scalegrid_cloud_profile" "aws" {
  database            = "mongodb"
  name                = "aws-use1-a"
  region              = "us-east-1"
  access_key          = var.aws_access_key
  secret_key          = var.aws_secret_key
  vpc_id              = "vpc-0123456789abcdef0"
  subnet_id           = "subnet-0123456789abcdef0"
  vpc_cidr            = "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnet_cidr         = "10.0.1.0/24"
  security_group_id   = "sg-0123456789abcdef0"
  security_group_name = "scalegrid-mongo"
  connectivity_config = "INTERNET"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_key` (String) AWS access key. Can be updated in place to rotate credentials.
- `database` (String) Database engine this profile is for: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.
- `name` (String) Unique name of the cloud profile.
- `region` (String) AWS region (e.g. `us-east-1`).
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) AWS secret key. Can be updated in place to rotate credentials.
- `security_group_id` (String) Security group ID.
- `security_group_name` (String) Security group name.
- `subnet_cidr` (String) Subnet CIDR block.
- `subnet_id` (String) AWS subnet ID.
- `vpc_cidr` (String) VPC CIDR block.
- `vpc_id` (String) AWS VPC ID.

### Optional

- `connectivity_config` (String) Connectivity configuration: `INTERNET`, `INTRANET`, `SECURITYGROUP`, or `CUSTOMIPRANGE`.
- `enable_ssh` (Boolean) Enable SSH access to the VPC.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_type` (String) Cloud provider (e.g. AWS).
- `id` (String) Machine pool ID of the cloud profile.
